column1: # Mapping from scripts/verify_*.c output files to golden_map.tsv synthetic keys.
# - source_path: file produced by verify_binmorph / verify_fhmtauto / verify_graymorph2
# - manifest_filename: name used as the key in tests/golden_manifest_c.tsv,
#   matching the C prefix in scripts/golden_map.tsv (e.g. binmorph1_verify.00.tif)
# Used by scripts/gen_c_manifest.sh to copy verify outputs into the regout
# directory under their canonical manifest names before hashing. See
